response.justification: The candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of hands-on fullstack work, deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple product companies, demonstrated testing craftsmanship (TDD, test frameworks he authored, CI/CD), and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at his current role. Cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, MongoDB/SQL, and Git are all covered. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest experience listed, though adjacent skills (Java, Jest-style TDD, Node backend frameworks) suggest a short ramp-up.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js/React depth and production scale (millions of mails/requests)
Current hands-on AI-agent development, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Testing and craftsmanship culture: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, authored test libraries, taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, which is core to the primary stack
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated (robotics work in 2016-2018)
Vitest/Playwright not named; testing expertise is proven but in different ecosystems (D, Selenium, Jest-era JS)

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin from primary/secondary stack
